title: Field-Consensus Threshold (FCT) Registry
description: Per-(domain, endpoint, species, direction, sex) native-scale severity bands with provenance, coverage, and source references. Replaces scattered hardcoded severity literals; authoritative source for classify_severity, confidence (D6/D4), and rule emission (R10/R11). Migrated in-place from shared/organ-weight-thresholds.json (M1).

_schema.description: Key-by-key docstring for human review. Mirrors organ-weight-thresholds._schema idiom.

entries.description: Keyed by '<DOMAIN>.<endpoint_or_test_code>.<direction>' where direction ∈ {up, down, both}.

joint_rules.description: Multi-endpoint rule bundles (e.g., Hy's Law, CRS Grade-2). Each rule references live syndrome-engine rule IDs for bidirectional integrity.

coverage.description: full = all in-scope species have bands; partial = some bands missing; none = no numeric bands (classifier emits provisional); catalog_driven = incidence catalog-sentinel; n-* = P4 small-N qualifier inheritance; stat-unavailable = registry bands exist for species but classifier could not compute magnitude (e.g., empty group_stats, missing sex stratum) -- semantically distinct from n-* which is about CI reliability at small but present N.

provenance.description: Hierarchy (most- to least-authoritative): regulatory > best_practice > industry_survey > bv_derived > extrapolated > stopping_criterion_used_as_proxy. catalog_rule is incidence-specific (AC-F2-7).

any_significant.description: When true, any statistically significant change is treated as meaningful (rodent brain/testes pattern).

cv_reference.description: Documentation-only: published CVs justifying the threshold choices. Not consumed by severity classifier.

bands.description: When species_specific=false, use key 'any'; otherwise key by species enum.

provenance.description: Entry-level provenance represents the LOWEST (most-extrapolated) species-band provenance — honest-uncertainty default. Per-band provenance, when present, overrides for species resolution.

nhp_tier.description: NHP-specific tier: C_qualitative means no numeric bands for NHP (spleen, thymus, lungs, pancreas per Amato 2022).

adaptive_requires.description: Optional block: conditions required to claim 'adaptive' for this endpoint (preserved from organ-weight-thresholds).

adaptive_ceiling_pct.description: Optional per-species adaptive-band ceiling (preserved from organ-weight-thresholds).

special_flags.description: Endpoint-specific caveats the engine should annotate (e.g., alpha2u_globulin_male_rat).

threshold.description: Either a numeric threshold with units, or a reference to a band level in an FCT entry.

syndrome_rule_ref.description: Must resolve against live syndrome-engine rule IDs at load time (bidirectional integrity per AC-F2-1).
